title: Totem of Medkit
description: Replaces the Totem of Undying with a First-Aid Kit.
body:
# Medkit

This is an extremely simple texture pack that I made some time ago and never bothered to release. The totem in-game is renamed to Medkit.There's not really much left to say. 

Should work in any version of the game. 

## Preview
![A golden first-aid kit with a green cross in the middle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3EuwFUNY/images/18a48be09431f22f4c2bf5ed9e62f157858b9b4e.png)
